projectDescription: A personal portfolio and creative showcase for Vaishali, a full-stack developer and designer, built with React, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS.
keyFeatures: Animated hero section with floating blobs and sticker decorations
About section with highlight cards showcasing skills and values
Interactive skills showcase with color-coded technology badges
Work experience timeline with role and company details
Project gallery with gradient cards and tech stack tags
Blog/journal section with category-filtered post cards
Contact form with service offerings and submission handling
Dreamy soft palette: lavender primary, peach accent, hot-pink pop
publicApiSurface: HeroSection — hero banner with name, tagline, and CTA buttons
AboutSection — bio, highlights grid with icons and descriptions
SkillsSection — dev and design skill badges with color palettes
ExperienceSection — work history cards with company, role, and period
ProjectsSection — project cards with gradient thumbnails, tags, and links
BlogSection — article cards with category, date, and read time
ContactSection — contact form and offered services list
Navbar — fixed glassmorphism nav with mobile menu
useScrollReveal — IntersectionObserver hook for reveal animations
